title: Grebe Type Foundry
prompt: A specimen site for a small independent type foundry. The type itself should be the entire show — and it should react to me.

direction.name: Living specimen
direction.thesis: A stark bone-and-black broadsheet where the typefaces are the only imagery — and they're alive: letters swell as the cursor passes through them, proving the variable axes by touch instead of description.
direction.signature: Cursor-proximity variable-font weight: each hero letter interpolates 340→900 by distance to the pointer, with a custom lagged cursor and a magnetic license button.
